---
title: "Owner Analysis"
format: html
author: Layla Chirar
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
lobster_abundance <- read_csv(here::here("data/Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20220829.csv"))
```


```{r}
summary(lobster_abundance)
```
```{r}
lobster_abundance <- lobster_abundance %>% 
    mutate(SIZE_MM = na_if(SIZE_MM, -99999))
```

```{r}
exclude_napl <- lobster_abundance %>% 
    filter(SITE != "NAPL")
```

```{r}
aque_70mm <- lobster_abundance %>% 
    filter(SITE == "AQUE" & SIZE_MM >= 70)
```

```{r}
max_lobster_mm <- lobster_abundance %>% 
  group_by(SITE, MONTH) %>% 
  summarize(MAX_LENGTH = max(SIZE_MM, na.rm = TRUE))
```
## Exercise: Data Visualization

```{r}
ggplot(data = lobster_abundance, 
       aes(x = SIZE_MM)) +
    geom_histogram() +
    facet_wrap(~SITE)
```
```{r}
lobsters_summarized <- lobster_abundance %>% 
  group_by(SITE, YEAR) %>% 
  summarize(COUNT = n())
```
```{r}
# line and point plot
lobsters_by_year <- ggplot(data = lobsters_summarized, aes(x = YEAR, y = COUNT)) + geom_point(aes(color = SITE)) + geom_line(aes(color = SITE)) 

ggsave("lobsters_by_year.png", plot = lobsters_by_year)
```

```{r}
lobster_size_lrg <- lobster_abundance %>%
    filter(YEAR %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021)) %>%
    mutate(SIZE_BIN = if_else(SIZE_MM <= 70, true = "small", false = "large")) %>%
    group_by(SITE, SIZE_BIN) %>%
    summarize(COUNT = n()) %>%
    drop_na()
```

```{r}
# dodged bar plot
lobsters_by_size <- ggplot(data = lobster_size_lrg, aes(x = SITE, y = COUNT, fill = SIZE_BIN)) + geom_col(position = "dodge")

ggsave("lobsters_by_size.png", plot = lobsters_by_year)
```
